overview: D&G Optimized Wellness and Hormones provides customized bio-identical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) for patients seeking hormone balance. Care is delivered in-person at their Florida clinic or via telemedicine where licensed.
highlights: Comprehensive lab work and consultation included in wellness plan
Customized BHRT including testosterone, estrogen, and progesterone therapy
Unlimited direct access to physicians via phone, email, and video
targetAudience: Adults experiencing hormone-related symptoms seeking personalized hormone balance under physician supervision.
